# version

**Instance Property**

The version number of the structure type being passed in as a parameter to the [doc://com.apple.systemconfiguration/documentation/SystemConfiguration/SCNetworkConnectionCreateWithServiceID(_:_:_:_:)] function. This structure is version `0`.

## Declaration

```swift
var version: CFIndex
```
